name: vhspace-mcp-marketplace
description: Private MCP plugin marketplace for Together AI

plugins.name: agent-memory
plugins.description: Long-term temporal knowledge graph memory for AI agents — search, store, and evolve operational knowledge across sessions

plugins.name: awx-mcp
plugins.description: MCP server for Ansible AWX / Automation Controller job management and orchestration

plugins.name: dc-support-mcp
plugins.description: MCP server for datacenter vendor support portals -- ticket management for ORI Industries and IREN

plugins.name: gpu-diag-mcp
plugins.description: MCP server for GPU XID/SXid diagnostics, NCCL test analysis, and ECC monitoring

plugins.name: ipa-mcp
plugins.description: FreeIPA MCP server for user/host group management, HBAC, and sudo rules

plugins.name: maas-mcp
plugins.description: MCP server and CLI for Canonical MAAS bare-metal provisioning and lifecycle management

plugins.name: netbox-mcp
plugins.description: A read-only MCP server and CLI for querying NetBox infrastructure data

plugins.name: redfish-mcp
plugins.description: MCP server and CLI for Redfish BMC management -- firmware, BIOS, power, health, sensors

plugins.name: ufm-mcp
plugins.description: MCP server for NVIDIA UFM InfiniBand fabric management and monitoring

plugins.name: viz-mcp
plugins.description: MCP server and CLI for data visualization -- render shareable reports, charts, and tables

plugins.name: weka-mcp
plugins.description: MCP server for Weka storage system management and monitoring
